ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "preferred_vehicle_type" TEXT /* Preferred type of vehicle for purchase */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of residence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale transaction */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Final sale price of the vehicle */,
  "sale_location" TEXT /* Location where the sale was made */,
  "sales_representative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative who handled the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_sales_representative_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_representative_id") REFERENCES sales_representatives ("sales_rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity of the vehicle available for sale */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer preference entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer associated with the preference */,
  "buying_price_preference" TEXT /* Preferred buying price category */,
  "maintenance_cost_preference" TEXT /* Preferred maintenance cost category */,
  "safety_rating_preference" TEXT /* Preferred safety rating */,
  "fuel_type_preference" TEXT /* Preferred fuel type */,
  "drive_type_preference" TEXT /* Preferred drive type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_preferences_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report (e.g., Sales Summary) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "data" TEXT /* Detailed data or summary of the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales representative, manager) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle feature entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle associated with the feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_category" TEXT /* Category of the feature (e.g., comfort, safety, entertainment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_representatives" (
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales representative */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the sales representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales representative */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the sales representative */,
  "sales_performance" TEXT /* Sales performance rating of the sales representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_rep_id")
)
